chunks.page_summary: This page provides technical dimensions, material specifications, and connection options for the Rheonics SRV FPC inline viscometer with a TriClamp fitting.

key_facts: The Rheonics SRV FPC offers a long, customizable insertion length, with a minimum length of 55.7 mm (2.19 inches).
Customers must specify the norm, size, and pressure rating for the flange/adapter, with DIN 32676 being a common standard and example diameters of 50.5 mm, 64 mm, and 77.5 mm provided.
The wetted surfaces of the device are constructed from Material 316L.
Rheonics specializes in inline process density and viscosity monitoring.
The provided document includes an isometric view and a dimensioned orthographic view of the product, with measurements in both millimeters and inches.
Contact information for Rheonics in Switzerland and USA is provided, including website, email, and phone numbers.
The product is protected by US and International patents.
The overall body diameter is 30mm (1.18 inch) and the tip diameter is 8mm (0.31 inch).
